assumption_text: Use the Zone I target-box population rather than all Tokyo residents.
rationale: The raid was explicitly aimed at a bounded rectangular target box including Asakusa, Honjo, and Fukagawa wards.

assumption_text: Treat the core episode as one day of exposure for person-month conversion.
rationale: The direct-death estimation target is the overnight 9-10 March raid itself, not later mortality.

assumption_text: Leave military deaths and military exposure null.
rationale: No source in the current packet separates same-night uniformed deaths in the target zone well enough for publication.
